title: The Iliad.
content:
Tear forever the garland of Homer, and number the fathers
    Of the immortal work, that through all time will survive!
    Yet it has but one mother, and bears that mother's own feature,
    'Tis thy features it bears, Nature, thy features eterne!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "The Iliad.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
